scripts.build: bun run tw:build && node ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng build --configuration production
scripts.dev: bunx dotenvx run -f .env.dev -- concurrently "bun run watch" "bun run server"
scripts.dev:vite: bunx dotenvx run -f .env.dev -- concurrently "bun run tw:watch" "bun run vite --host --port 5173 --strictPort --open" "bun run server"
scripts.build:runtime:prepare: bun -e "import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'; const hasServer = existsSync('dist/treaty/server/server.mjs'); const hasBrowser = existsSync('dist/treaty/browser/index.csr.html') || existsSync('dist/treaty/browser/index.html'); if (!(hasServer && hasBrowser)) process.exit(1);"
scripts.build:runtime:bundle: bun run build:runtime:prepare || bun run build; bun build --target=bun --packages=external --outfile=dist/treaty/server/server.bundle.mjs dist/treaty/server/server.mjs
scripts.build:runtime:bin: bun run build:runtime:prepare || bun run build; bun build --compile --format=esm --minify-whitespace --minify-syntax --bytecode --outfile=dist/runtime/treaty-server server.ts
scripts.build:runtime:bin:linux: bun run build:runtime:prepare || bun run build; bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --format=esm --minify-whitespace --minify-syntax --bytecode --outfile=dist/runtime/treaty-server server.ts
scripts.build:runtime:bin:local: bun run build:runtime:prepare || bun run build; bun build --compile --format=esm --minify-whitespace --minify-syntax --bytecode --outfile=dist/runtime/treaty-server-local server.ts
scripts.precommit:verify: bun run build && bun run vite:build
scripts.env:prod:ensure: bun -e "const prod = Bun.file('.env.production'); if (!(await prod.exists())) { const example = Bun.file('.env.production.example'); if (await example.exists()) { await Bun.write(prod, await example.text()); console.log('Created .env.production from .env.production.example'); } else { console.error('Missing .env.production and .env.production.example'); process.exit(1); } }"
scripts.env:prod:encrypt: bun run env:prod:ensure && bunx dotenvx encrypt -f .env.production
scripts.env:prod:rotate: bun run env:prod:ensure && bunx dotenvx rotate -f .env.production
scripts.cf:prepare: bun run env:prod:key:require && bun run env:prod:ensure && bunx dotenvx run -f .env.production -- bun --no-env-file backend/scripts/prepare-cloudflare-deploy.ts
scripts.cf:secrets:sync: bun run env:prod:key:require && bun run env:prod:ensure && bunx dotenvx run -f .env.production -- bun --no-env-file backend/scripts/sync-cloudflare-secrets.ts
scripts.cf:deploy: bun run cf:prepare && bunx wrangler deploy
scripts.docker:prod:up:bin: bun run env:prod:encrypt && bun run env:prod:secret:prepare && bunx dotenvx run -f .env.production -- docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml -f docker-compose.prod.bin.yml up -d --build
scripts.docker:prod:down: bun run env:prod:ensure && bunx dotenvx run -f .env.production -- docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml down && bun run env:prod:secret:cleanup
scripts.deploy:option-a: bun run docker:prod:up:bin && bun run cf:deploy
scripts.prod: bunx dotenvx run -f .env.production -- bun run build && bunx dotenvx run -f .env.production -- bun run server:prod
scripts.prod:bin: bunx dotenvx run -f .env.production -- bun run build && bunx dotenvx run -f .env.production -- bun run build:runtime:bin:local && bunx dotenvx run -f .env.production -- bun run server:prod:bin
scripts.prod:bundle: bunx dotenvx run -f .env.production -- bun run build && bunx dotenvx run -f .env.production -- bun run build:runtime:bundle && bunx dotenvx run -f .env.production -- bun run server:prod:bundle
